title: Yield Pin
summary: Slightly more raw tonnage each mining delivery cycle.

title: Plant Auditor
summary: Slightly lower processing fee when you collect refined output.

title: Intake Broker
summary: Slightly lower hassle fee when the plant buys your raw cargo.

title: Crown Waiver
summary: Slightly lower extraction tax on licensed mining cycles.

title: Reserve Geologist
summary: Claim richness depletes a little more slowly over time.

title: Convoy Escort
summary: Raid hazards skim a little less ore from your site storage.

title: Geo Stabilizer
summary: Geological shocks cut output a bit less severely.

title: Pit Crew
summary: Rigs accumulate wear a little more slowly each cycle.

title: Contract Stipend
summary: Mission credit payouts are slightly higher.

title: Cadence Analyst
summary: Challenge point grants from claims are slightly higher.

title: Claims Adjuster
summary: Credit grants bundled with challenge rewards are slightly higher.

title: Refinery Hand
summary: Each refining batch yields slightly more output for the same inputs.

title: Field Mechanic
summary: Field rig repair bills are slightly cheaper.

title: Property Rider
summary: Credit bonuses from property incidents are slightly higher.

title: Registry Clerk
summary: In-game mining license registration costs slightly less.
